findings.summary: Plan has 2 blocking issues: (1) Slice 1 and Slice 3 are structurally coupled via settings-agents.tsx import from dialog-settings.tsx, (2) plan proposes adding dedicated IPC handlers that duplicate already-existing generic storeGet/storeSet/storeDelete handlers
ElectronAPI type has 58 properties; adding getCustomAgents/setCustomAgents is unnecessary since generic storeGet/storeSet already support arbitrary store names
Agent config form validation, compaction threshold logic, and settings search/filter are all testable as pure functions. Only IPC handlers and dialog rendering require Electron/happy-dom.
Existing store-get handler returns null on missing key (bad for agent list loading); store-set/delete/clear/keys/length handlers have zero error handling
Group B (context display) is fully isolated. Group C depends on Group A for settings-agents.tsx import. Groups A and B can ship in any order relative to each other.
settings.agents.title/description i18n keys already exist in ALL 18 locale files — no en.ts modification needed for those
No compaction event data source exists in the codebase — the compaction indicator feature is underspecified and may be blocked
